site.name: Petwellly
site.description: Petwellly is the ERP built for professional dog breeders: health, litters, sales, client portal and finance — all in one place.

newsletter.title: Tips for your kennel, monthly
newsletter.subtitle: Management, health and real cases. No spam, ever.
newsletter.privacy: By subscribing you accept our privacy policy.
newsletter.successMessage: Done! You'll get the first email very soon.
newsletter.errorMessage: Could not send. Please try again.

hero.subtitle: Petwellly puts records, health, litters, sales and the client portal in one place. Built with real breeders, not powerpoint slides.
hero.trust: No card required · Cancel anytime · Free migration
hero.imageAlt: Petwellly dashboard showing dogs, litters, reservations, reminders and mobile app

features.title: Designed for modern kennels
features.subtitle: Replace 6 tools (Excel, WhatsApp, Drive, calendar, forms, Stripe) with one.

dog.title: Complete dog record
dog.body: Health, genetics, documents and history — fully traceable and shareable with vet or client.

litter.title: Litters & puppies
litter.body: Plan crosses, log the whelping and manage puppy reservations without chaos.

client.title: Client portal
client.body: Clients see reservations, puppy photos and invoices. You write once.

calendar.title: Unified calendar
calendar.body: Vaccines, whelpings, deliveries, vet visits. One calendar per kennel.

finance.title: Clear finance
finance.body: Income, expenses and invoices in one click. Real margin per litter and per dog.

pipeline.title: Sales pipeline
pipeline.body: From inquiry to delivery: kanban with every prospect, none lost.

workflow.title: From Excel and WhatsApp to a kennel that runs itself
workflow.subtitle: Four steps to take back control of your day.

import.title: 1 · Import what you already have
import.body: Upload your CSV of dogs and clients. The wizard sets it up in 10 minutes.

configure.title: 2 · Configure once
configure.body: Contract templates, vet protocols, automatic notifications: define them once, applied forever.

operate.title: 3 · Operate in one click
operate.body: Every action (reservation, whelping, vaccine, invoice) connects to the rest with no copy-paste.

grow.title: 4 · Grow on real data
grow.body: See margin per litter, breed and client. Decide with numbers, not gut feel.

testimonials.title: We don't have testimonials yet
testimonials.body: We're launching Petwellly with real breeders. As soon as we have stories we can publish with their permission, they'll live here. Until then, we'd rather show you the product than ads.

items.a: No. Petwellly is built for breeders, not for developers. The setup wizard configures everything in 30 minutes.

items.q: What if I already have everything in Excel?
items.a: We import it for you. Upload your file and the system creates dogs, clients and reservations without typing.
Yes. Grant access to the records they need and nothing else. If they're on staff, they get a dedicated panel.

items.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
items.a: It's yours. Export everything as CSV/PDF whenever you want. We never lock anything.
Yes, fully responsive. Weigh a puppy or log a vaccine from the kennel right on your phone.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to simplify your kennel?
ctaFinal.body: 14 days free. No card. We migrate your data for you.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything a professional kennel needs, without the bloat of a generic ERP.
features.intro: Every module talks to the others: a vaccine deducts inventory, a reservation triggers delivery, a whelping updates the litter and creates puppy records.

dogs.title: Dog record
dogs.description: Clinical, genetic and reproductive file for every dog in one screen.
items: Summary, microchip, weight and status (available/reserved/sold)
Unified medical history in chronological order
Genetics: DM, PRA, MDR1, hip dysplasia, full panel
Visual pedigree with risky-cross alerts
Weight history with weekly chart
Photo gallery with featured shot for catalog
Health booklet PDF generated in one click

litters.title: Litters & breeding
litters.description: From heat to puppy delivery: automatic milestones and pre-natal reservations.
items: States: planned → confirmed → born → weaned → delivered
Auto milestones: mating, ovulation, ultrasound, whelping, weaning
Pre-birth puppy reservations with waiting list
External stud with pedigree and owner info
Contracts on weaning from template

health.title: Veterinary health
health.description: Calendar, digital prescriptions and SOAP notes. The vet works inside Petwellly.
items: Vet calendar by week / month / quarter
Health booklet PDF generated on the spot
Risky-cross alert for two carriers
Digital prescription with dose, duration and posology
Treatment tracking with adherence
Genetic tests integrated in the pedigree tree

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Kanban pipeline with the full client history in a single thread.
items: Kanban: lead → contacted → interested → reservation → client
Communication log: in-app + WhatsApp + email
CSV importer for your existing base
Lifetime value, dogs purchased, last purchase date
Auto reminders (birthdays, 6-month checkup)

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Contract, payments and delivery checklist without Word or printer.
items: PDF contract from template
Delivery checklist: booklet, pedigree, kit, contract, payment
Auto notifications when status changes
Reminder one week before delivery
Partial payments with visible progress bar

finance.title: Finance & inventory
finance.description: Real margin to the cent and stock that deducts itself.
items: Quotes that become invoices in one click
Report per dog and per litter (cost vs income)
Configurable VAT and multi-rate
Inventory auto-deduction on vaccines or sales
Lots with expiration for vaccines and meds
Suppliers with price history
Overdue invoices badge in the menu

portal.title: Client portal
portal.description: Your client watches the puppy grow and pays online without you.
items: Guided onboarding the first time
Visible health booklet of the puppy
Weekly follow-up gallery from birth
Document upload (ID, payment, contract)
Direct chat with templates and attachments

ctaFinal.title: Want a 20-min demo of the areas that matter to you?
ctaFinal.body: We tailor the demo to what you actually do, no commitment.

pricing.title: Simple pricing for real breeders
pricing.subtitle: No lock-in, no per-user surcharges. Start free for 14 days.

items.a: No. Cancel anytime, keep your exportable data.

items.q: What if I exceed my plan limits?
items.a: We notify you before charging anything. Upgrade or stay (we don't silently disable critical features).
Anytime, both ways. We pro-rate the billing.
Card and SEPA. For Kennel Pro, annual invoice by transfer is also available.
Yes, we invoice with your VAT/CIF — fully deductible for your business.

ctaFinal.title: Still have doubts?
ctaFinal.body: We'll call you and answer in 10 minutes. No pressure.

about.title: Built with breeders. Not with powerpoints.
about.subtitle: Our priority: stop management from stealing your time so you can give it back to your dogs.

items.title: We talk to breeders
items.body: Every product decision gets validated with real breeders before it ships, not against a spreadsheet.

items.title: We don't sell what we can't deliver
items.body: If an integration or module isn't ready yet, we tell you before you sign.

items.title: Your data is yours
items.body: Export everything to CSV/PDF anytime. No locks.

items.title: Human support
items.body: Talk to someone who knows a dysplasia from a luxation.

ctaFinal.title: Fancy a virtual coffee?
ctaFinal.body: We'll show you Petwellly with your real spreadsheet, no scripts.

blog.subtitle: Practical guides on management, health and growth for professional kennels.

contact.subtitle: We answer in less than 4 hours during business hours.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At Petwellly we treat your personal data with the same care you'd give a litter. This policy explains what we collect, why and how we protect it.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Petwellly platform. By creating an account you accept them.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: We use essential cookies and, with your consent, analytics cookies. We do not use advertising cookies.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This link is more lost than a puppy on its first walk.
